seoKeywords: structured bag charm with turn lock

summary.en: Italian-designed mini bag charms that clip onto your favourite handbag. Structured silhouettes, polished hardware, and a little Positano sunshine in every colorway.

seoHeading.en: Mini bag charms designed in Positano, Italy

seoBody.en: Caryina creates structured mini bag charms with turn-lock closures, textured finishes, and polished hardware. Each charm is designed in Positano and crafted to add personality to any handbag. Available in silver, rose splash, and peach colorways.

answer.en: Caryina is a micro-accessories brand designing mini bag charms in Positano, Italy. Each piece is a structured miniature handbag with real hardware, textured finishes, and its own personality.

question.en: What makes these different from other bag charms?

answer.en: Every Caryina charm is a proper little bag -- structured body, turn-lock closure, polished hardware. They're designed to look like a tiny version of your favourite handbag, not a keyring novelty.

summary.en: Browse every colorway in the launch collection. Same structured silhouette, same polished hardware -- pick the finish that speaks to you.

trustBullets.en: Designed in Positano, Italy with polished hardware and textured finishes.
30-day free exchange and 90-day hardware guarantee on every order.
Secure checkout with tracked shipping across the EU.

description.en: The classic carry. A structured silhouette with a curved top handle and turn-lock closure -- the charm that started it all.
Made to dangle. A compact profile with a shoulder-strap detail, designed to swing from your bag and catch the light.
Small but mighty. The most compact charm in the collection -- all the hardware and texture, scaled down to pocket size.

proofBullets.en: Structured silhouette, top-handle carry. A shaped body with side gussets holds its form — designed to hang from a bag strap, not fold into it.
Turn-lock hardware closure. A front strap with a turn-lock clasp closes the bag cleanly. Polished metal hardware on the strap keeper and clasp plate.
Designed in Positano, Italy. Manufactured to specification; designed in Italy. The Amalfi origin story is in the object, not just the packaging.
Textured finishes across colorways — metallic reptile emboss, croc emboss, pebbled grain. Selected colorways include a stitched building facade applique.
30-day free exchange, 90-day hardware guarantee. Change of mind — exchange within 30 days. Hardware fails within 90 days: replacement, no forms.

summary.en: Need a hand? We're here to help with orders, exchanges, or anything else.

channels.en: Email us directly -- include your order number and we'll get back to you faster.
Bought on Etsy? Message us through the Etsy conversation thread for the quickest reply.

summary.en: We only collect what we need to fulfil your order and help if something goes wrong.

bullets.en: Only required checkout and fulfillment data are collected.
Platform providers process payment and delivery data under their legal terms.
Your email address may be used to send a one-time notification about products you expressed interest in. You can withdraw consent at any time by contacting us.

notice.en: This is a summary of our privacy practices. A full privacy policy will be published soon.

summary.en: Delivery times are estimated at checkout based on your location.

bullets.en: International buyers are responsible for applicable customs duties and import taxes

summary.en: Changed your mind? Exchange any charm within 30 days, free of charge.

bullets.en: Exchange includes all colorways; original accessories should be included where applicable

summary.en: By placing an order you agree to our sales terms and support policies.

bullets.en: Availability and delivery times may vary depending on stock.
Product photos and descriptions represent the items currently available.
